description: Māmā Mihirangi & the Māreikura is a powerful and fierce all-female Māori world-roots production, a captivating journey that celebrates the rising divinity of feminine power and cultural identity. Fusing ancestral wisdom, healing, and empowerment through contemporary performance, led by internationally renowned artist/activist and the pioneering Queen-of-Loops, Māmā Mihirangi. Regarding their live performance, “I was personally overcome by an incomprehensible, powerful force… their mesmerizing fractal flow and otherworldly theatrics invoked a rapturous level of being that only the purest music is able to conjure." (Roots Music Canada)
title: Māmā Mihirangi & the Māreikura Concert
